THE COURT ORDERS THAT ALL CORRESPONDENCE EXCHANGED WITH BANK OF AMERICA, NOTES, OR MEMORANDA RELATING TO COMMUNICATIONS WITH BANK OF AMERICA BE PRODUCED.
